title: libpod/image: Use RepoDigests() in Inspect()
body:
To get the more-robust handling from 0f6535cf (#2106) here too.

Fixes #2086 (again :).

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *rhatdan*, *wking* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
We need a new podman release with this fix.
We're planning to cut a 1.0.1 soon for 8 - we can make sure this is one of the backports, and get it into our other streams as well
